calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848.

Richard Michael Lieberman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Nextarts A California Corporation.
The Court granted a waiver of the Witness Requirement.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Kathy Baddeley and Northern California Bride or Groom Magazine, Inc.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-50 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $10,722.27
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,216.00
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $1075.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $15,013.27

Judgment signed in open court.
